# htmlteam Agent Guide

htmlteam is an Agent-native HTML deployment backend.

Primary interface:
- Fast deploy API: POST /api/deploy
- Content API: GET/PATCH /api/deploy/content
- CLI command: htmlteam
- Management API base: /api/v1
- Auth: Authorization: Bearer <HTMLTEAM_API_KEY>
- Stable output: pass --json for machine-readable command results.

Core CLI commands:
- htmlteam deploy <file> --json
- htmlteam deploy --stdin --filename index.html --json
- htmlteam list --json
- htmlteam get <id-or-code> --json
- htmlteam content <id-or-code> --json
- htmlteam update <id-or-code> <file> --json
- htmlteam enable <id-or-code> --json
- htmlteam disable <id-or-code> --json
- htmlteam delete <id-or-code> --yes --json

- POST /api/deploy
- GET /api/deploy/content?code=abc123
- PATCH /api/deploy/content
- GET /api/deploy/:code/qrcode
- POST /api/v1/deployments
- GET /api/v1/deployments
- GET /api/v1/deployments/:id
- PATCH /api/v1/deployments/:id
- DELETE /api/v1/deployments/:id
- GET /api/v1/deployments/:id/content
- PUT /api/v1/deployments/:id/content
- GET /api/v1/deployments/by-code/:code
- Public page: GET /s/:code

HTML constraints:
- filename must end with .html or .htm
- content must include <!doctype html> or <html>
- max content size is 1 MB
